headline: MCO Q2 Earnings Beat on Rising Analytics Demand & Higher Issuances
summary: Moody's Q2 earnings beat estimates as revenues rise 15%, fueled by higher issuances and steady analytics demand despite rising expenses.

headline: What's Behind Accenture's Nine-Billion-Dollar Bet on Its Stock?
summary: The consulting giant is quietly using its balance sheet to buy its way into entirely new, product-led markets that could redefine its growth story.

headline: Nomura Core Equity Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: Seagate Technology shares continued to advance as demand for high-capacity storage tied to AI data-center buildouts supported further positive earnings revisions.
